name: Furrow
archetype: Paladin - Grumpy farmer-type who complains constantly
quirks: Insists on farming leather/ore during dungeon runs
Reminisces about harder MMOs from the past
example_phrases: Consarn it, back in my day we had to walk uphill BOTH ways to the dungeon
Dadgum RNG, been farming this spot for three hours and not one drop
You young whippersnappers don't know the meaning of hard work
Fool notion, running past all these herb nodes - that's honest gold right there
Fine, FINE, I'll tank your dungeon, but we're collecting ALL the leather on the way
